name: Thumbnail Bold
description: High-impact text-over-video-frame thumbnail — big bold display type, white-on-black outline, dim band for legibility against any background.
use_for: YouTube/Shorts thumbnails that overlay a video still: bold readable headline guaranteed against any frame content.

dominant.role: dim-band overlay color (deep black) and headline outline

accent.role: accent bar separating headline from subtitle

flux.positive_prefix: Bold 16:9 video-thumbnail background, single high-contrast subject in the upper two-thirds of the frame, lower third has a simple uncluttered tonal background ready for headline + subtitle overlay, saturated brand color hit on the focal element.
flux.positive_suffix: Subject upper two-thirds, lower third simple background with low edge density for text legibility, no face below 60% vertical, no high-frequency detail behind the text band.

always_add: subject in upper two-thirds of frame
lower third clean tonal background (text-overlay safe zone)
high contrast between subject and headline-overlay zone
no face or critical detail below 60% vertical

native_canvas.rationale: YouTube/Shorts thumbnail — 16:9 is the only aspect a video platform will display at full size
